name: New York Golf and Fitness
about: New York Golf & Fitness is a members-only facility blending golf simulation with fitness training in Kingston, NY. It features four bays equipped with Uneekor high-speed camera technology and GSPro software for access to 1,000+ lidar-based courses. The venue offers structured coaching programs, personalized video feedback, and full golf equipment services including club fitting. While primarily a member-focused space, non-members can access the technology through private lessons, coaching sessions, or by booking a simulator consultation or trial session.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor camera technology provides accurate performance feedback
Access to 1,000+ lidar-based GSPro courses for realistic play
Integrated fitness facility for holistic performance training
Personalized video coaching with progress tracking
Multiple membership tiers to suit different usage needs

simulator_hardware.notes: Powering all four bays for performance feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the facility offers a variety of clubs available for purchase and professional club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink services, so it appears outside food and beverages are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time frame for an 18-hole simulation, but sessions can be booked through their booking system.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility is described as welcoming for all ages and abilities, but specific kid-friendly amenities or programs are not mentioned.
